examples: The largest land-dwelling member of the weasel family is strong, tenacious, sharp-toothed and cunning.
She's a tenacious woman. She never gives up.
He is regarded as a tenacious and persistent interviewer.
Bell argues that the insurgency was fuelled by the extraordinarily tenacious hold of religious culture.
But although Woods can only boast one victory in 2004, he remains as tenacious as ever.
